checks.name: e2e_scenario_count
checks.detail: files matching *_e2e*.rs / e2e_*.rs / tests/e2e/*.rs with at least one test function

checks.name: cross_module_integration_count
checks.detail: integration test files importing >= 2 distinct frankenengine_node submodules

checks.name: script_logging_ratio
checks.detail: Python scripts under scripts/ that import test_logger or use logging.getLogger / logging.basicConfig

checks.name: mock_patterns_in_prod_files
checks.detail: files containing mockall::mock! / mockito / unittest.mock outside /tests/ or *_test.rs paths

notes: This gate is a living scorecard. It can run at any pass through the tree.
Heuristics intentionally lean conservative: actual coverage may exceed counted #[test] markers
(e.g. parameterised tests, helper functions invoked by tests).
When verdict=FAIL, expand on the failing check via the `detail` field rather than guessing.
